title: Bottom row complete: X Z
description: Finish the bottom row and the alphabet: ring (X) and pinky (Z)

tips.text: X (ring) and Z (pinky) finish the bottom row — and the alphabet
Z and X are rare, but you still own them now
All 26 letters online — the rest is practice

character_tips.anna: X and Z complete your alphabet. From here, you can type anything.
character_tips.maxim: All 26 letters online. Ring and pinky finish the job. The rest is practice.
character_tips.klavochka: Every letter your friend now, my sunshine ☀️
